notes.connections:
Keithley 1 CH1 "+12V FMC"  → ZedBoard J20 (or eval +12V turret) — powers the on-board LDOs that derive +3.3V, REFIN 5V, VAMP+, VAMP-, EN.
Keithley 0 CH1 "+5.4V AVDD" → +5.4V turret on EVAL-AD4630-24FMCZ (lift on-board LDO feed jumper for this rail).
Keithley 0 CH2 "+1.8V DVDD" → +1.8V turret (lift on-board LDO feed).
Keithley 0 CH3 "VIO 1.8V"   → VIO turret (lift on-board LDO feed; otherwise VIO is tied to +1.8V on the eval board).
ZedBoard      → EVAL-AD4630-24FMCZ via FMC-LPC; ZedBoard VADJ jumper = 2.5 V.
Signal source → IN_A+ / IN_A- SMA (default ADA4945-1 differential AFE).
Clock         → on-board 100 MHz XO (default; J6 CLK IN unused).
notes.sources:
Keithley 1 CH1 – +12 V @ 1.0 A limit (board primary; on-board LDOs make +3.3V, REFIN 5V, VAMP+, VAMP-, EN).
Keithley 0 CH1 – +5.4 V @ 0.2 A limit (AD4630 AVDD, datasheet 5.34–5.46 V).
Keithley 0 CH2 – +1.8 V @ 0.2 A limit (AD4630 DVDD, 1.77–1.81 V).
Keithley 0 CH3 – +1.8 V @ 0.2 A limit (AD4630 VIO digital I/O, 1.77–1.81 V).
notes.monitoring:
DEWESOFT current (DSI-5A, 5 A range, slew limited):
    CH1 I → in-line with +5.4V AVDD feed
    CH2 I → in-line with +1.8V DVDD feed
    CH3 I → in-line with VIO 1.8V feed
DEWESOFT voltage (SIRIUS-HS-LVv2, 10 V range):
    CH1 V  → +5.4V turret to GND
    CH2 V  → +1.8V turret to GND
    CH3 V  → VIO  turret to GND
    Beam V → facility beam-on TTL / run gate
Keithley supplies also report I/V over GPIB for slow logging.
notes.general:
EVAL-AD4630-24FMCZ rad-effects setup (TID monitoring; SEL/SEU not configured).
    Configuration / data capture done in ACE on a separate PC via ZedBoard USB OTG — not through this GUI.
    GUI handles power sequencing and slow rail logging only.
    Power-up order: +12V FMC → wait for EN to assert → +5.4V → +1.8V → VIO.
    Tight 200 mA current limits on the three AD4630 rails so any latch-up trips the supply.
    Beam V channel is a witness for accelerator run gate alignment.
